allow: PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/kinderbetreuung-dresden" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "consent-default vorhanden: $\($html -match 'consent-default'\)"; "gtag.js vorhanden: $\($html -match 'googletagmanager.com/gtag/js\\?id=G-TEST12345'\)"; "consent denied default: $\($html -match ""analytics_storage: 'denied'""\)"; "Landingpage-H1 vorhanden: $\($html -match 'ruhigere Alternative zur Krippe'\)")
